title: carphephorus pseudoliatris
intro: Carphephorus pseudoliatris, also known as the False Aromatic Blazing Star, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Carphephorus pseudoliatris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve making a tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or using the plant in salves and ointments to apply directly to the skin.
